abstract.text: Make your audio app’s actions available to Apple Intelligence and Siri by adopting schemas for common audio playback actions.

inlineContent.text: The
domain defines app schemas that provide a
structured representation for common audio playback actions and content.
Apply schemas in the
domain to make your app’s audio functionality available to Apple Intelligence and Siri.
The
framework provides the types that describe a person’s audio search and playback request.
Your app implements an
to receive these types, find matching audio content, and return app entities.
Each schema defines the requirements for intents, parameters, and results so people get a consistent experience across audio apps.
For example, a person can play a song on different apps that support the
schema with the same phrases.
The following table maps example phrases that apply to each schema:
Audio intent schemas
Example phrases
“Play music.” or “Play hip-hop in the living room.”
“Follow this podcast.” or “Add this song to my library.”
“Add this song to my running playlist.”
“Create a station based on this song.” or “Play more music like this.”
“What song is this?” or “Shazam.”
“I like this song.” or “I don’t like this song.”
Xcode generates a template implementation when you type
and select a schema from the suggestions list.
For more information about making your app’s actions available to Apple Intelligence and Siri, see

abstract.text: An intent schema that sets the like state of an audio item to liked, unliked, or unset.
An entity schema for a radio show.
An enum schema for an invocation source parameter.
Make your phone app’s actions available to Apple Intelligence and Siri by adopting schemas for calling actions.
Make content and actions discoverable by Apple Intelligence and support system experiences like Siri, Spotlight, Shortcuts, and widgets.
Make your note-taking app’s actions available to Apple Intelligence and Siri by adopting schemas for common note actions.
A query that provides entity values to the system; for example, for visual intelligence search.
An entity schema for  news brief.
Make your navigation app’s actions available to Apple Intelligence and Siri by adopting schemas for common navigation actions.
An enum schema for a playback attributes parameter.
Make your calendar app’s actions available to Apple Intelligence and Siri by adopting schemas for common calendar actions.
An intent schema that warms up an audio item by setting the queue without starting playback.
An entity schema for a classical music recording.
An entity schema for an audiobook.
Adopt the audio and clock schemas so people can play music and set alarms with Siri.
